business.name: Butter + Bloom Bakery
business.tagline: Butter makes it better. Flowers make it yours.

sampleQuotes: Maya made our wedding cake and it was everything. Not just beautiful — the lemon-raspberry layer was the best cake I've ever eaten.
I send cookies here for every birthday, every baby shower, every Tuesday when I need a pick-me-up.

brand.colorDirection: Pastel pink, mint, vanilla, warm white

content.heroSubtext: From-scratch cakes, cookies, and pastries made fresh daily in Uptown Shelby. Custom celebration cakes that taste as good as they look.

services.name: Custom Celebration Cakes
services.description: Weddings, birthdays, baby showers, graduations. Two weeks notice preferred. Tasting boxes available.

services.name: French Macarons
services.description: A dozen delicate macarons in seasonal flavors. Classic vanilla bean, raspberry rose, pistachio, salted caramel, and rotating specials.

services.name: Decorated Sugar Cookies
services.description: Custom royal icing cookies for any occasion. Perfect for party favors and corporate gifts.

services.name: Croissants & Pastries
services.description: Butter croissants, pain au chocolat, morning buns, and seasonal danishes. Baked fresh by 7am.

services.name: Cupcake Box
services.description: Six cupcakes in your choice of flavors. Vanilla bean, chocolate fudge, lemon-raspberry, and seasonal specials.

testimonials.quote: Maya made our wedding cake and it was everything. The lemon-raspberry layer was the best cake I've ever eaten. She's a true artist.
testimonials.author: Sarah K.

testimonials.quote: I send cookies here for every birthday, every baby shower, every Tuesday when I need a pick-me-up. The decorated sugar cookies are almost too pretty to eat. Almost.
testimonials.author: Jen M.

testimonials.quote: The croissants are better than anything I've had in Charlotte. We're lucky to have Butter + Bloom in Shelby.
testimonials.author: David R.

content.story: Maya Chen left a career in graphic design to go to pastry school in 2016. She spent three years working in Charlotte bakeries before opening Butter + Bloom in a tiny storefront on Lafayette Street in 2019. Her philosophy is simple: beautiful things should taste beautiful too. Every cake is designed with a designer's eye and a baker's heart. The name comes from her two favorite ingredients —
because everything starts with good butter, and
because flowers are her primary design inspiration. The shop quickly became a Uptown Shelby favorite, known for croissants that sell out by 9am and custom cakes that make people cry at weddings.
sellingPoints: Everything made from scratch daily using real butter, local eggs, and seasonal ingredients
Custom celebration cakes designed to your vision — bring inspiration photos or let Maya create
French macarons in 5+ rotating seasonal flavors
Beautiful decorated sugar cookies for any occasion
Downtown Shelby storefront with coffee, pastries, and a cake consultation table
